task_description: Implement foundational infrastructure for the Sleep Audio Pipeline: Input S3 bucket, Output S3 bucket, and EventBridge rule that triggers on Object Created events from the input bucket. Follow strict TDD with aws_cdk.assertions.

verification.summary: 7 tests pass with 100% coverage. cdk synth succeeds producing correct S3 buckets (encrypted, versioned, public-access-blocked, EventBridge-enabled) and EventBridge rule (Object Created from input bucket, CloudWatch Log Group target). Tests exercise real CDK constructs and would fail if any resource or property were removed.
